description: Update test files to remove all tests and includes for deleted modules (thinking_engine, decision_engine, safe_parse, droplet, crystal), and ensure the test suite compiles and passes.
steps: In MK_OS/tests/test_main.cpp: Remove test functions: test_safe_parse_no_throw, test_droplet_pool_corrupt_load, test_crystal_store_corrupt_load, test_thinking_engine_prompt_construction, test_decision_engine_tool_dispatch, test_decision_engine_confirmation_required, test_three_layer_fallback, test_decision_engine_personality
In MK_OS/tests/test_main.cpp main(): Remove corresponding RUN_TEST calls for all deleted tests
In MK_OS/tests/test_integration.cpp: Remove test_thinking_to_decision_flow function entirely
Run 'cd MK_OS && make test' and verify all remaining tests pass
acceptance_criteria: Running 'cd MK_OS && make test' compiles the test binary without errors
No references to deleted modules remain in test files
findings: All 8 deleted-module tests removed (thinking_engine, decision_engine, droplet, crystal). safe_parse.h test kept since the file still exists. test_thinking_to_decision_flow removed from integration tests. Final result: 59 tests pass, 0 failures, 443 assertions pass.
